ogTitle: Beach Holm vs Beaconsfield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beach Holm and Beaconsfield.
heading: Beach Holm vs Beaconsfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beach Holm, Queensland and Beaconsfield, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaconsfield has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Beach Holm (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beach Holm or Beaconsfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beach Holm has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Beaconsfield scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beach Holm scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Beaconsfield scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beach Holm or Beaconsfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaconsfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
